selection_method: F2-maximized among recall>=0.70 (recall≥0.70 (precision<0.30 unavoidable), best F2)
limitation: When recall>=0.70: max_precision=0.1899. When precision>=0.30: max_recall=0.4497.
justification: Threshold 0.44 achieves recall=0.800 on test. For wildfire early warning, catching 80.0% of fires (missing 114) is worth 1270 false alarms.
